text_original: its fun and worth it, I actually paid the lifetime fee and I have fun, I prefer the RPG stories but it does have things that need to be worked out like one time I was traveling down a road and I just kept going and going until I had to ask that something happen
text_zh: 挺有趣的，很值得。我实际上付了终身费用，玩得很开心。我更喜欢 RPG 故事，但它确实有些地方需要改进，比如有一次我沿着一条路走，就一直走啊走，直到我不得不要求发生点什么。
reply_original: Thank you for choosing the Lifetime Package! It is awesome to hear you are enjoying the RPG stories. For those "endless road" moments, try the Reset button in the [+] menu to spark a new event. If the AI gets stuck again, please email details to support@fantachat.ai so we can tune the adventure logic. Happy roleplaying!
reply_zh: 感谢您选择终身套餐！很高兴听到您喜欢这些 RPG 故事。对于那些“无尽之路”的时刻，请尝试 [+] 菜单中的重置按钮来触发新事件。如果 AI 再次卡住，请将详细信息发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们调整冒险逻辑。祝您角色扮演愉快！
